title: Amount of end of year payment
content:
An end of year payment payable to an employee to whom this 
Part applies who has been employed by the same employer for the 
whole of a payment period shall be—
Last updated date
12.11.2015
Employment Ordinance
Part IIA	
2A-8
Section 11B	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
	
(a)	
the end of year payment specified in that behalf in the 
contract of employment; or
	
(b)	
if an end of year payment is not so specified, a sum 
equivalent to a full month’s wages of the employee.
